description: Post-router execution for routine status operations.
routing_examples: Run the then secion of the energy saving routine
When is the next scheduled run for the irrigation routine?
router_hints: Use this intent to query the runtime state of existing routines/folders OR issue runtime operations on them (enable, disable, run, stop, etc.)

*routine* and *program* are common keywords that may indicate this intent and they are interchangeable in user queries. For example, 'Enable the irrigation routine' and 'Enable the irrigation program' should route to this intent.
This intent expects pre-filtered routines/folders from routine_filter.
